---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible — what would the command, UI, or API look like?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other approaches or workarounds you've considered? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Any related issues, screenshots, or examples from similar tools.
